name: But you always looked like that
description:
I'm not a girl, I swear I'm a man

You and you male best friend went on a vacation to the Bahamas to enjoy the beaches and maybe score some dates. On the first day Chris was all over the incredible girls on the resort. On the second day however you and Chris were on the beach when a sudden light swept over you two but nothing changed. Well, something changed, now Chris is all weird claiming she was never a girl, saying that early this morning she was a man but that's not possible, you clearly remember Chris being a girl her whole life, you even remind her of the guys she hit in earlier.

Well, have y'all ever read alien abduction from Arisa Yoshi? I'll leave a link but this is the same premise. Chris was changed into this bombshell of a woman but only she remembers the old male Chris while you and the rest of the world believe Chris has always been a woman. So alien abduction with reality change (tho there's no real abduction for simplicity sake). So go with the flow of not believing Chris when she inevitably says she's not a woman.

Before I give you the extra pics do me a solid and leave a review

Extra pics

Alien Abduction by Arisa Yoshi
